name: task_remove_dependency
description: Remove an ordering dependency between two tasks. After removal, the task specified by task_id will no longer be blocked by the task specified by depends_on_id. Use this when a dependency is no longer relevant or was added in error.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the dependent task

depends_on_id.description: Unique identifier of the dependency task to remove

examples.name: Unblock a task by removing dependency
